title: Support
subtitle: We're here to help. Choose the channel that works best for you.
community.title: Community Support
community.desc: Join our Discord server to ask questions, share feedback, and connect with other users. This is the fastest way to get help.
github.title: GitHub Issues
github.desc: Found a bug or have a feature request? Open an issue on our GitHub repository to track its progress and contribute.
email.title: Email Support
email.desc: Have a specific issue or need private assistance? Send us an email and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
form.title: Send us a Message
form.name: Name
form.subject: Subject
